Work at ISO

Career and job opportunities, posts, placements at ISO.

Current Job Openings

We’re not currently hiring for any positions. Follow us on social media to be notified of future opportunities.

The ISO office is located on the Haldimand Tract, part of the reserve land given to the Haudenosaunee people of Six Nations in the Haldimand Proclamation of 1784. We acknowledge that this land is the traditional territory and shared hunting grounds of the Haudenosaunee and Anishnaabeg Peoples. We acknowledge the Dish With One Spoon Treaty, whose spirit is based in collective stewardship and sharing of land and resources, that extends to all nations living in and around Toronto.

Indigenous Screen Office

General Inquiries: info@iso-bea.ca
Funding Inquiries: funding@iso-bea.ca
Press Inquiries: communications@iso-bea.ca
